name: com.patterkit.patterplay
description: Patterplay for Unity - the native C# runtime for Patter. Loads a compiled .patterc bundle and plays branching narrative directly in Unity (no web runtime, JS, or IPC). Every Patterplay runtime plays the same bundle with the same behaviour.

samples.description: Loads a compiled .patterc and plays a simple flow, logging each step (the shared Patterplay API demo).
Plays the interactive Patter tour: an OnGUI transcript with clickable choices, plus optional per-line audio resolution via PatterAudioResolver.
